# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

elasticsearch_snapshot_backup:
  version: "8.x"
  repositories:
    s3_repo:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: "${S3_BUCKET}"
        base_path: "elasticsearch/snapshots"
        region: "${AWS_REGION}"
        client: "default"
        compress: true
        server_side_encryption: true
        canned_acl: "private"
        storage_class: "standard"
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
    fs_repo:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: "/mnt/elasticsearch-snapshots"
        compress: true
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
  operations:
    create_repository_s3:
      method: "PUT"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_s3"
      body:
        type: "s3"
        settings:
          bucket: "${S3_BUCKET}"
          base_path: "elasticsearch/snapshots"
          region: "${AWS_REGION}"
          client: "default"
          compress: true
          server_side_encryption: true
          canned_acl: "private"
          storage_class: "standard"
          max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
          max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
    create_repository_fs:
      method: "PUT"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_fs"
      body:
        type: "fs"
        settings:
          location: "/mnt/elasticsearch-snapshots"
          compress: true
          max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
          max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
    verify_repository_s3:
      method: "POST"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_s3/_verify"
    verify_repository_fs:
      method: "POST"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_fs/_verify"
    list_snapshots_s3:
      method: "GET"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_s3/_all"
    list_snapshots_fs:
      method: "GET"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_fs/_all"
    create_snapshot_daily_s3:
      method: "PUT"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_s3/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}"
      query:
        wait_for_completion: "false"
      body:
        indices: "${SNAPSHOT_INDICES:-*}"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: false
        metadata:
          taken_by: "ops"
          policy: "daily"
    create_snapshot_daily_fs:
      method: "PUT"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_fs/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}"
      query:
        wait_for_completion: "false"
      body:
        indices: "${SNAPSHOT_INDICES:-*}"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: false
        metadata:
          taken_by: "ops"
          policy: "daily"
    snapshot_status_s3:
      method: "GET"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_s3/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_status"
    snapshot_status_fs:
      method: "GET"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_fs/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_status"
    delete_snapshot_s3:
      method: "DELETE"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_s3/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}"
    delete_snapshot_fs:
      method: "DELETE"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_fs/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}"
    restore_snapshot_s3:
      method: "POST"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_s3/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_restore"
      query:
        wait_for_completion: "false"
      body:
        indices: "${RESTORE_INDICES:-*}"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: false
        rename_pattern: "${RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN:-}"
        rename_replacement: "${RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-}"
        index_settings:
          index.number_of_replicas: "${RESTORE_REPLICAS:-1}"
        ignore_index_settings:
          - "index.refresh_interval"
    restore_snapshot_fs:
      method: "POST"
      path: "/_snapshot/ops_fs/${SNAPSHOT_NAME}/_restore"
      query:
        wait_for_completion: "false"
      body:
        indices: "${RESTORE_INDICES:-*}"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: false
        rename_pattern: "${RESTORE_RENAME_PATTERN:-}"
        rename_replacement: "${RESTORE_RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-}"
        index_settings:
          index.number_of_replicas: "${RESTORE_REPLICAS:-1}"
        ignore_index_settings:
          - "index.refresh_interval"
  automation:
    snapshot_name_template: "daily-{now/d{yyyy-MM-dd}}"
    schedule_cron_utc: "0 15 2 * * ?"
    retention:
      enabled: true
      keep_last: 30
      delete_older_than_days: 90
    recommended_cluster_settings:
      - method: "PUT"
        path: "/_cluster/settings"
        body:
          persistent:
            snapshot.max_concurrent_operations: 3
  prerequisites:
    s3:
      note: "Requires repository-s3 plugin installed and keystore credentials configured."
      keystore:
        - "bin/elasticsearch-keystore add s3.client.default.access_key"
        - "bin/elasticsearch-keystore add s3.client.default.secret_key"
        - "bin/elasticsearch-keystore add s3.client.default.session_token (optional)"
    fs:
      note: "Requires path.repo set on all nodes and shared mount available."
      elasticsearch_yml:
        path:
          repo:
            - "/mnt/elasticsearch-snapshots"
